title: Meta commits to 1 gigawatt of custom chips with Broadcom as Hock Tan decides to leave board
summary_full: Meta commits to deploying 1 GW of custom in-house MTIA chips codesigned with Broadcom in sweeping new multiyear deal announced Tuesday
summary_public: Meta commits to deploying 1 GW of custom in-house MTIA chips codesigned with Broadcom in sweeping new multiyear deal announced Tuesday
